description.ko: 유기적 식물학과 첨단 디지털 건축의 하이테크 융합으로, 광섬유 케이블을 통해 식물이 자라나고 꽃들이 네온 빛으로 피어납니다.
description.en: A high-tech fusion of organic botany and advanced digital architecture, where plants grow through fiber-optic cables and flowers bloom with neon light.

prompt: A hyper-realistic digital art piece of FLORA-9, featuring translucent crystalline flowers with glowing neural networks as veins, integrated into a futuristic motherboard forest, soft bokeh of floating data particles, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, synthwave aesthetic.
